parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT coalesce(json_agg(symbol), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT symbol FROM quantum.exec_flow_audit WHERE ts > now() - interval '5 days' GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 8) q) AS top_symbols, (SELECT coalesce(json_object_agg(coalesce(side, 'UNKNOWN'), n), '{}'::json) FROM (SELECT side, count(*) AS n FROM quantum.exec_flow_audit WHERE (ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date = ((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date - 1) GROUP BY side) s) AS yesterday_sides

messageValues.message: You are a rigorous sell-side equity strategist. Respond in plain prose, no JSON, no markdown headers, no curly braces.
You are a rigorous sell-side equity strategist. Respond in plain prose, no JSON, no markdown headers, no curly braces.

parameters.content:
## Daily Research Thesis - Pre-Market (QTP)

**Purpose:** slow-path morning research crew (Bull -> Bear -> Judge, xAI Grok) writing ONE row/day to quantum.daily_research_thesis.

**Schedule:** cron 30 8 * * 1-5, workflow timezone America/New_York (set in settings). NYSE-2026 holiday + weekend guard in Build Crew Prompts skips by returning 0 items (logged, downstream does not run).

**Credentials:** Postgres = "Postgres account" (lnLr649ylxATlCF8, SSL-ignore like other QTP wfs). xAI = n8n credential "xAi account" (qyUISF3PUWktrFtN, type xAiApi) attached to the three Grok model subnodes - NO staticData key seeding needed for this workflow.

**Models:** bull/bear = grok-3-mini (temp 0.3), judge = grok-3 (temp 0), 30s timeout each. Judge must emit STRICT JSON; fences stripped; parse failure throws (fail loud). NO continueOnFail anywhere.

**pg-param guard:** all free text is single-quote doubled AND $<digit> rewritten to "USD <digit>"; a final regex guard refuses to send SQL containing $<digit>.

**TTL:** row expires 16:30 ET same day. crew_version QTP_DRT_CREW_v1.0_20260706.

meta.note: Active/published version d327daf0 exported (workflow.versionId == activeVersionId at export time). QTP_DRT_CREW_v1.0_20260706 Bull -> Bear -> Judge Grok crew, one row/day to quantum.daily_research_thesis. Secrets redacted with REDACTED_* placeholders; staticData intentionally null. Re-attach credentials (Postgres lnLr649ylxATlCF8, xAi qyUISF3PUWktrFtN) after import.
